## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance continues to improve week-over-week, with over 400 clicks per week achieved](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Integration pages are progressing, with 10 published and more in drafts; logos to be added before publishing remaining drafts](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New inline blog CTAs to be implemented, with designs and logic expected by Dec 9th](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Content enrichment initiative planned to enhance top-performing articles with visuals, quotes, and improved UX elements](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Refresh strategy ongoing, with 5 articles refreshed weekly alongside new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Week-on-week growth continues to improve](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Passed 400 clicks per week milestone](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Best-ranking keywords for top 20 articles updated](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Notable rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - "Headless CMS vs WordPress" ranking \#3 on Google
      - "Headless CMS security" ranking \#2 on Google

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [Approximately 10 integration pages published](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [More drafts ready, awaiting logo additions](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Process clarified: team to source and add logos before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Render and React handling pages to be completed by next week](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### Blog Article Enhancements

  - [Inline blog CTAs to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Design team creating banners for top, middle, and bottom funnel articles](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Implementation process discussed, using code snippets in content editor](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Golzar to provide complete package (imagery, CTA logic, tracking links) by Dec 9th](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Content enrichment initiative planned:](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Custom images and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Tables and diagrams](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Expert quotes and "Our Take" sections](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Improved intros with more engaging elements](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Author bios and LinkedIn credentials](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Human review suggested for top-performing articles to ensure technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

### Content Freshness and Accuracy

  - [Discussion on referencing recent data and research (ideally not older than 2021-2022)](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Plan to update article titles to reference 2025 for relevance](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Importance of manually checking and updating references, especially for rapidly evolving topics like AI](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### Refresh Strategy and Measurement

  - [Refreshes measured over 8-week periods (8 weeks before and after refresh)](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Currently refreshing 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Prioritization based on traffic drops and keyword ranking losses](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Content gap research used to identify improvement opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement logos for integration page drafts and prepare for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Await CTA design package from Golzar (expected Dec 9th) to implement new inline CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Begin content enrichment process for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Continue with refresh strategy, focusing on articles with traffic and ranking drops](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Update article titles to reference 2025 where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Maxime to take ownership of integration page program by December 9th](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Paul and Maxime to discuss tagging system for CTA logic implementation](https://fathom.video/share/QBTSceznf5Zqy_Kk2h9eP92ausCiGTcX?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
